scenario.title: Cracked screen from accidental drop — first incident
scenario.description: Customer reports their iPhone 14 Pro screen shattered after being dropped on concrete. This is their first accidental damage claim within the plan term.

service_fee.notes: Standard ADH service fee applies for each incident

policy_references.snippet: If during the Plan Term you submit a valid claim notifying Apple that the Covered iPhone has failed due to accidental damage from handling ('ADH'), Apple will subject to the service fee described below either (i) repair the defect... or (ii) exchange the Covered iPhone.

ADH coverage will expire and all of Apple’s obligations to you under this section 3.2 will be fulfilled in its entirety before the end of the Plan Term when Apple, as a result of ADH claims, has provided to you two (2) Service Events.

scenario.reasoning: The cracked screen resulted from an unexpected, unintentional external event (a drop), which is explicitly covered under section 3.2 as accidental damage from handling. The customer has not exceeded the two-incident ADH limit, and the standard $49 service fee applies.

persona.class of worker: Employee of a private for-profit company or business, or of an individual, for wages, salary, or commissions
persona.defining quirks: Always wears a piece of traditional Korean jewelry
persona.detailed job description: Conducts research and develops new medicines
persona.family presence and age: With related children 5 to 17 years only
persona.household type: Female householder, no spouse/partner present, with children of the householder less than 18
persona.mannerisms: Often uses hand gestures while speaking
persona.personal time: Spends free time with her children or in her garden

system_prompts.customer:
You are a policyholder filing a claim with AppleCare.
You are given a persona and a scenario to role-play as the policyholder. Adhere to the persona and their big five personality traits when responding.
You will have a conversation with an AppleCare bot to file your claim.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique. Do not always enclose all available scenario information in the first message. Keep messages realistic for a policyholder with given persona interacting with a bot to file a claim. Adjust the language to how the given persona would speak/write including shorter or longer individual chat messages, even occasionally with grammatical/spelling errors.
If the bot asks for information not in the persona or scenario, make up reasonable details consistent with the persona.
When the bot ends the conversation, or you want to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.

Scenario description:
Customer reports their iPhone 14 Pro screen shattered after being dropped on concrete. This is their first accidental damage claim within the plan term.

Customer data you have available for filing the claim (respond "Unknown" when asked for missing details):
{
  "device": "iPhone 14 Pro (128 GB)",
  "plan_agreement_number": "APLCARE-9876543210",
  "serial_number": "G6YH2L3M9PQR",
  "phone_number": "+1-415-555-0198"
}

Persona to role-play as:

  },

system_prompts.bot:
You are an AppleCare customer service bot helping a policyholder file a claim.
Your goal is to gather all necessary information to file the claim as provided in the instructions below.
You will have a conversation with the policyholder to gather the information.
Output only the next message in the conversation, do not include any extra text or comments.
The conversation should be turn-taking and unique.
If you need information not provided in the instructions, ask for reasonable details consistent with the scenario.
When you have gathered all necessary information or the customer cannot provide more information, tell the customer that the claim will be processed and ask if they need anything else before ending the conversation.
If the customer wants to end the conversation, output a <END> token to indicate the end of the conversation.
Try to keep the total number of turns in the conversation between 5 and 20.
Remain professional and friendly throughout the conversation. Keep the language concise and clear.

Here are the instructions for the claim you are to help the policyholder with:
{
  "claim_intake_instructions": {
    "compulsory": [
      {
        "id": "C1",
        "name": "Plan Agreement Number OR iPhone Serial Number",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, at the beginning of claim intake",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 5",
        "notes": "Used to validate coverage eligibility."
      },
      {
        "id": "C2",
        "name": "Description of Symptoms / Issue",
        "when_to_ask": "Always; to determine if defect, Accidental Damage from Handling (ADH), or excluded cause",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(ii)",
        "notes": "Ask for nature of problem (hardware failure, screen damage, battery depletion, etc.)."
      },
      {
        "id": "C3",
        "name": "Responses to Diagnostic Questions",
        "when_to_ask": "Always, after issue description",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(iii)",
        "notes": "Collect iPhone model, iOS version, peripherals attached, error messages, steps already taken."
      }
    ],
    "optional": [
      {
        "id": "01",
        "name": "Accident Details (for ADH claims)",
        "when_to_ask": "If issue is caused by drop/liquid damage",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.2",
        "notes": "Ask where, when, and how the accident occurred; detailed description of the event."
      },
      {
        "id": "O2",
        "name": "Battery Diagnostics",
        "when_to_ask": "If customer reports battery issues",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 3.1",
        "notes": "Confirm battery capacity has dropped ≥50%."
      },
      {
        "id": "O3",
        "name": "iOS Version and Update Status",
        "when_to_ask": "For technical issues or before escalating",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 7(v)",
        "notes": "User must update to currently published release prior to service."
      },
      {
        "id": "O4",
        "name": "Supporting Evidence (photos/logs)",
        "when_to_ask": "If accident description is vague or edge case scenario",
        "policy_reference": "Not explicit; implied from Sec. 3.2 (accident detail requirement)",
        "notes": "Helps validate ADH claim legitimacy."
      },
      {
        "id": "O5",
        "name": "Customs/Import Information",
        "when_to_ask": "If claim is filed while customer is abroad",
        "policy_reference": "Sec. 6.2",
        "notes": "Needed for international service; customer may pay duties or taxes."
      }
    ],
    "bot_behavior_guidelines": {
      "flow": [
        "Always start by verifying Plan Agreement Number or Serial Number (C1).",
        "Ask user to describe the issue (C2).",
        "Follow up with diagnostic questions (C3).",
        "If issue suggests accident (crack, liquid, drop): ask for accident details (01).",
        "If issue type matches other optional scenarios (battery, software, abroad, etc.): request corresponding optional info (O2–O5)."
      ],
      "tone": "Supportive, concise, guiding user step-by-step.",
      "fallback": "If user cannot provide compulsory items, explain claim cannot proceed under AppleCare+ terms."
    }
  }
}

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for contacting AppleCare. How may I help you today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Hello. I accidentally dropped my iPhone 14 Pro on concrete, and the screen shattered. I need to file a claim for repair under my AppleCare plan. This is my first accidental damage claim. What do you need from me to start the process?
messages.raw_text: Hello. I accidentally dropped my iPhone 14 Pro on concrete, and the screen shattered. I need to file a claim for repair under my AppleCare plan. This is my first accidental damage claim. What do you need from me to start the process?

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: I’m sorry to hear about your iPhone. To begin, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or the iPhone serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.
messages.raw_text: I’m sorry to hear about your iPhone. To begin, could you please provide your Plan Agreement Number or the iPhone serial number? This will help us verify your coverage.

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: Sure, the Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9876543210, and the serial number of my iPhone is G6YH2L3M9PQR. Please let me know if you need any other details.
messages.raw_text: Sure, the Plan Agreement Number is APLCARE-9876543210, and the serial number of my iPhone is G6YH2L3M9PQR. Please let me know if you need any other details.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for that information. Could you please describe the issue with your iPhone in your own words, including any symptoms or problems you are experiencing besides the shattered screen?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for that information. Could you please describe the issue with your iPhone in your own words, including any symptoms or problems you are experiencing besides the shattered screen?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: The screen is completely shattered and cracked, making it really hard to see anything clearly. The touch responsiveness is also impaired in some areas, so I can't use the phone properly. Other than that, the phone powers on and the sound works fine.
messages.raw_text: The screen is completely shattered and cracked, making it really hard to see anything clearly. The touch responsiveness is also impaired in some areas, so I can't use the phone properly. Other than that, the phone powers on and the sound works fine.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thanks for the details. To help with diagnostics, could you please confirm the iPhone model, the iOS version installed, and whether you have any accessories or peripherals connected? Also, did you see any error messages or have you tried any troubleshooting steps?
messages.raw_text: Thanks for the details. To help with diagnostics, could you please confirm the iPhone model, the iOS version installed, and whether you have any accessories or peripherals connected? Also, did you see any error messages or have you tried any troubleshooting steps?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: My iPhone model is iPhone 14 Pro with 128 GB storage. The iOS version is 17.2. I don’t have any accessories connected right now. I didn’t see any error messages. Since the screen is so badly cracked, I haven’t tried much troubleshooting except restarting the phone once. It still powers on, but using the screen is very difficult.
messages.raw_text: My iPhone model is iPhone 14 Pro with 128 GB storage. The iOS version is 17.2. I don’t have any accessories connected right now. I didn’t see any error messages. Since the screen is so badly cracked, I haven’t tried much troubleshooting except restarting the phone once. It still powers on, but using the screen is very difficult.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the information. Since this is an accidental damage claim caused by dropping your iPhone, could you please provide details about the accident? Specifically, where and when it happened, and how exactly the phone was dropped?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the information. Since this is an accidental damage claim caused by dropping your iPhone, could you please provide details about the accident? Specifically, where and when it happened, and how exactly the phone was dropped?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: The accident happened yesterday afternoon around 3 PM. I was outside near my front porch, and I accidentally dropped the phone onto the concrete while I was rushing to answer a call from my children. It slipped out of my hand and hit the ground pretty hard. I wasn’t using a case at the time, unfortunately.
messages.raw_text: The accident happened yesterday afternoon around 3 PM. I was outside near my front porch, and I accidentally dropped the phone onto the concrete while I was rushing to answer a call from my children. It slipped out of my hand and hit the ground pretty hard. I wasn’t using a case at the time, unfortunately.

messages.speaker: bot
messages.text: Thank you for the accident details. Your claim will now be processed for the screen repair under your AppleCare plan. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?
messages.raw_text: Thank you for the accident details. Your claim will now be processed for the screen repair under your AppleCare plan. Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

messages.speaker: customer
messages.text: No, that will be all for now. Please proceed with the repair claim. I appreciate your help. Thank you.
messages.raw_text: No, that will be all for now. Please proceed with the repair claim. I appreciate your help. Thank you. <END>
